rows.finalText: Around "What is the next right step in my calling", the reading gathers most strongly around purpose / calling themes with a right path emphasis. In Past, Book (26) shows where things already stand: not everything is visible yet. Book often points to private knowledge, research, what is not yet visible, and the need to learn before you declare certainty in your calling. In Present, Tower (19) becomes the pivot, so structure, authority, and boundaries dominate turns into both pressure and opportunity. Tower often points to distance, standards, official structure. Looking ahead, Future with Mice (23) points toward reduce stressors and prevent gradual depletion, if the middle-card lesson is handled with care. Mice often points to the small repeated drain that weakens conviction or meaning if it is left unaddressed in your calling. What ties the vocational pattern together is the link between Tower (19) and Mice (23): a blend of institution and erosion, asking you to balance professionalism with connection while staying alert to ignoring minor losses until they accumulate. Tower (19) is the real hinge in this spread. Tower often points to distance, standards, official structure, and the part of the situation governed by rules rather than mood in your calling. Tower (19) with Mice (23) keep emphasizing a blend of institution and erosion, asking you to balance professionalism with connection while staying alert to ignoring minor losses until they accumulate. Balance professionalism with connection so Mice (23) can land as lived experience rather than just possibility.
